data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_1962C6: LUKE: We're here on a dare.\pHeheh, if I show her how cool I am,\nshe'll fall for me. I know it!\pI know! I'll cream you and show her\nhow cool I am!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196368: LUKE: Well, we lost but that's okay!\nI'm right here by your side.\lWe'll make it through this dare!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_1963CB: LUKE: If you want to take me on, bring\nsome more POKéMON.\pIf you don't, I won't be able to show\noff how cool I am to my girl!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196449:
DEZ: I came here on a dare with my
boyfriend.\pIt's really scary, but I'm with my
boyfriend. It's okay.\pI know! I'll get my boyfriend to look
cool by beating you!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196504: DEZ: We're lovey-dovey, so we don't\ncare if we lose!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196539: DEZ: If you want to challenge us, you\nshould bring at least two POKéMON.\pMy boyfriend's strong.\nJust one POKéMON won't do at all.
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_1965BB: Memories of my darling SKITTY...\nMy eyes overflow thinking about it.
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196600: Ooch, ouch... There are holes in the\nground here and there.\pI didn't notice and took a tumble from\nthe floor above.
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196674: Hey! Are you searching for POKéMON?\nYou came along after me! You're rude!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_1966E7: People don't come here often, so\nI thought there'd be rare POKéMON.
